name.title: Name your workspace
name.description: Workspaces keep your agents organized, one for personal, one for work, etc.

provider.title: Connect your AI
provider.description: Houston uses <emph>your own</emph> subscription. We never see your credentials.

errors.setupFailed: We couldn't finish setting up your workspace. Please try again.

welcome.title: Welcome to Houston
welcome.tagline: Houston is where you build assistants that work with the same apps you already use.
welcome.stepsTitle: A quick setup to get your assistant working:

steps.brain: Connect an AI provider so it can think
steps.email: Send your first real email with it

defaults.focus: Help me stay organized, prepare my day, draft messages, protect focus time, and keep track of follow-ups.
defaults.approvalRule: Ask before sending messages, creating calendar events, or changing anything in connected apps.
defaults.firstWorkflow: Set up my first useful daily workflow

meet.title: Meet your assistant
meet.body: Give your assistant a name and a color. You can change them later.

brain.title: Pick your AI
brain.body: Choose the AI that powers your assistant. You bring your own subscription, Houston never sees your credentials.

providerLogin.title: Connect {{provider}}
providerLogin.body: Sign in once so your assistant can use {{provider}} on your behalf.

connected.title: You're all set
connected.body: We found {{provider}} on this computer. You're signed in with your own subscription, so there's nothing to set up here.

tools.title: Sign in once to use your apps
tools.body: One sign-in lets your assistant work with your apps. After that it connects each app, like Gmail or your calendar, only when you actually need it, so there's no big setup now.
tools.waiting: Waiting for you in your browser...

connected.title: You're all set
connected.body: Your assistant can now connect to your apps whenever you need them.

email.title: Send your first email
email.body: Connect your email and your assistant will send one real message for you. That is setup done.

intro.title: Send a real email
intro.body: Your assistant connects to your real apps to do actual work. Let's connect your email and send one, for real.
